qa_pairs.question: Which apps are associated with the Weather category?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT app_all.app_id FROM app_all
JOIN app_labels ON app_all.app_id = app_labels.app_id
JOIN label_categories ON app_labels.label_id = label_categories.label_id
WHERE label_categories.category = 'Weather'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which app all entities having at least one related app labels record (linked on app_all.app_id = app_labels.app_id), whose app labels record itself has at least one related label categories record (linked on app_labels.label_id = label_categories.label_id) with category equal to 'Weather'?

qa_pairs.question: Which apps have active events with is_active at least 1 and a timestamp exactly equal to -4616735474893214586?

JOIN app_events_relevant ON app_all.app_id = app_events_relevant.app_id
JOIN events_relevant ON app_events_relevant.event_id = events_relevant.event_id
WHERE app_events_relevant.is_active >= 1 AND events_relevant.timestamp = -4616735474893214586
